platforms.label: iOS
platforms.requiredBuildSurface: Release build on device or accepted simulator with optional Skia renderer installed

platforms.label: Android
platforms.requiredBuildSurface: Release APK on device or accepted emulator with optional Skia renderer installed

scenarios.label: Native Skia install verification
scenarios.requiredEvidence: Install optional Skia renderer dependencies, run native release build, and verify the SVG default path still works without static Skia imports.

scenarios.label: Free chart renderer parity
scenarios.requiredEvidence: Line, Area, Bar, StackedBar, Pie, Donut, Progress, and Contribution surfaces render with injected Skia primitives without missing text, gradients, clipping, tooltips, or legends.

scenarios.label: Pro preview renderer parity
scenarios.requiredEvidence: Combined, Candlestick, range selector, sticky axis, crosshair, tooltip, and debug-layout preview surfaces render correctly with injected Skia primitives.

scenarios.label: Skia performance comparison
scenarios.requiredEvidence: Compare SVG and Skia native release-build timing and memory on dense line, multi-line scrub, range selector, scrollable bar, combined, and candlestick scenarios.

rows.notes: iOS optional-Skia temp-app install and Release xcodebuild passed with @shopify/react-native-skia@2.6.2; native renderer parity screenshots and Skia performance comparison still required before Skia can be complete.

Android optional-Skia temp-app install and release APK build passed with @shopify/react-native-skia@2.6.2; native renderer parity screenshots and Skia performance comparison still required before Skia can be complete.

Local renderer-contract parity and renderer-injected iOS Release build evidence exist; native iOS screenshots plus text, gradients, clipping, tooltip, legend, and interaction parity review still required.

Local renderer-contract parity and renderer-injected Android Release build evidence exist; native Android screenshots plus text, gradients, clipping, tooltip, legend, and interaction parity review still required.

Local Pro-preview renderer-contract parity and renderer-injected iOS Release build evidence exist; native iOS CombinedChart, CandlestickChart, range-selector, sticky-axis, crosshair, tooltip, and debug-layout screenshot/interaction review still required.

Local Pro-preview renderer-contract parity and renderer-injected Android Release build evidence exist; native Android CombinedChart, CandlestickChart, range-selector, sticky-axis, crosshair, tooltip, and debug-layout screenshot/interaction review still required.
